title: foxglove.JointStates
description: The state of a set of joints at a given time.

items.title: foxglove.JointState
items.description: The state of a single joint (revolute or prismatic).

position.description: Joint position. Radians for revolute joints, meters for prismatic joints.

velocity.description: Joint velocity. Rad/s for revolute joints, m/s for prismatic joints.

acceleration.description: Joint acceleration. Rad/s² for revolute joints, m/s² for prismatic joints.

effort.description: Joint effort (force or torque). Nm for revolute joints, N for prismatic joints.
